title: Mainstay Recipe Book
description: Mainstay expantion for Patbox's Brewery, food and drinks.
body:
# Mainstay Brewery Datapack  

This is a custom **datapack addon** for the [Brewery Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/brewery), created specifically for the [**Mainstay Server**](https://discord.gg/haW9YQKCjJ) with the support of [CabbagePigeon](https://modrinth.com/user/cabbagepigeon).  

## **Features**  
The Mainstay Brewery Datapack introduces:  
- **Unique Recipes**: Adds creative food and drink recipes to enhance gameplay.  
- **Special Effects**: Unlocks unusual effects, such as changing player sizes or altering vanilla attributes.  
- **Custom Textures**: Many recipes use **custom heads** for a 3D, immersive look and feel.  

## **Purpose**  
The aim of this datapack is to enrich the player's experience with exciting and visually appealing consumables while offering mechanics that go beyond vanilla limitations.  

For updates and discussions, join the Mainstay community on [Discord](https://discord.gg/haW9YQKCjJ).
